quests_completed: SQL Raid: Restructure Indian Govt CPI Data

daily_quests.title: ASX 200 Price Momentum Analysis
daily_quests.description: Using ASX 200 historical price data, write a SQL query with window functions to calculate 30-day moving average and identify stocks where the closing price has risen for 5+ consecutive trading days. Use ROW_NUMBER() and LAG() to detect consecutive gains. Return stock ticker, date, closing price, 30-day MA, and consecutive gain streak count. Filter for streaks of 5+ days only.

daily_quests.title: NSW Road Crash Data Cleaning Pipeline
daily_quests.description: Download NSW Road Crash Data. Write a Python script using pandas to: (1) handle missing values in crash severity and location columns (impute or drop as appropriate); (2) standardise datetime formats; (3) extract hour of day and day of week from crash timestamp; (4) create a severity category column (map numeric codes to 'Fatal', 'Serious Injury', 'Other Injury', 'Non-Injury'); (5) remove duplicate records based on crash ID and timestamp; (6) export cleaned dataset to CSV. Document all transformations applied.

daily_quests.title: Australian Weather Anomaly Detection Pipeline
daily_quests.description: Using Bureau of Meteorology temperature and rainfall observations dataset: (1) Load CSV data with pandas, clean missing values and outliers using IQR method; (2) Calculate monthly mean temperature and total rainfall by station; (3) Load cleaned data into SQLite database with station metadata; (4) Write SQL query using CTEs to identify stations where current month's temperature is >2 standard deviations above the 10-year historical average; (5) Return station name, location (state), current month temp, historical mean, and anomaly magnitude. Document the entire workflow from raw CSV to final anomaly report.
daily_quests.dataset: Australian Weather Observations — Bureau of Meteorology (Kaggle jsphyg collection)
